candidate_definition_hints.text: This project contains HTTP/2 support for Swift projects using [SwiftNIO](https://github.com/apple/swift-nio). To get started, check the [API docs](https://swiftpackageindex.com/apple/swift-nio-http2/main/documentation/niohttp2).
